hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'site-packages/sisepuede' && echo 'BLOCKED: Never modify sisepuede package. Fix via CSV inputs only.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'run_calibration0' && echo 'REMINDER: Run compare_to_inventory.py on the output' || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'apply_step' && python3 -c "import pandas as pd,sys; df=pd.read_csv('ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv'); n=df.isna().sum().sum(); i=sum(1 for c in df.select_dtypes('number').columns if df[c].apply(lambda x: x!=x or (isinstance(x,float) and abs(x)==float('inf'))).any()); print(f'Validation: inf={i}, NaN={n}') if n>0 or i>0 else print('Validation: clean')" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ "$(basename "$FILE")" = 'CLAUDE.md' ] && CHARS=$(wc -c < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null) && [ "$CHARS" -gt 40000 ] && echo "WARNING: CLAUDE.md is $CHARS chars (>40k threshold)" || true

LATEST=$(ls -td ssp_modeling/ssp_run_output/calibration_* 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -f "$LATEST/diagnostics/diff_report.csv" ] && python3 -c "import pandas as pd; d=pd.read_csv('$LATEST/diagnostics/diff_report.csv'); s=d[d['inventory'].abs()>0.01]; print(f'Last calibration: {s["diff"].abs().sum():.1f} MtCO2e | {(s["error_pct"]<=15).sum()}/{len(s)} within 15%')" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No previous calibration run found'
